cases.prompt: We just shipped. Update the docs to match what changed.

assertions.text: Reads all project docs and cross-references the diff to find what changed
Polishes CHANGELOG voice, cleans up TODOs, and optionally bumps VERSION

cases.prompt: PR 머지했으니까 문서 동기화 좀 해줘.

assertions.text: Performs a post-ship documentation update reflecting the merged changes
Polishes the CHANGELOG and cleans up stale TODOs
